# Frenchies R Us NY
> Premium French Bulldog breeder in New York. Royal bloodlines, DNA-tested parents, health-guaranteed puppies raised with love.

Frenchies R Us NY is a premier French Bulldog breeder based in New York specializing in rare colors, champion bloodlines, and health-tested litters. Our Frenchies are raised in a home environment and come fully socialized, vaccinated, and ready for their forever families. We offer stud services and nationwide puppy delivery.

## Puppies & Availability

- [Puppies](https://frenchiesrusny.com): Browse available French Bulldog puppies — rare colors, standard colors, males and females
- [Secure Your Pup](https://frenchiesrusny.com/secure-your-pup): Reserve your puppy — deposit process, timeline, and what to expect

## Breeding Program

- DNA-tested parents with full health panels
- Champion and rare-color bloodlines — lilac, merle, blue, chocolate, and more
- Stud services available for approved females
- Royal lifestyle program — puppies raised with premium nutrition and early neurological stimulation

## Key Facts

- French Bulldog specialist — rare and standard colors
- New York-based, ships nationwide
- DNA health testing on all breeding dogs
- Health guarantee with every puppy
- Socialized with children, other pets, and various environments
- Early neurological stimulation program

## Contact

- Website: https://frenchiesrusny.com
- Inquiries: https://frenchiesrusny.com/secure-your-pup
